channel.title: Posts on Ron's Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Ron's Portfolio

item.title: 0. Hello
item.description:
Welcome to my website.

I update it every so often with stories about my projects and other exciting things from my life.

Thanks to Steven Chen for inspiring me to start it and helping set it up.

I’m mostly a hardware guy, but my code projects can be found on my github.

Below are a few tests to see if these features still work whenever I update the framework/theme
